Title: SteveBot MCP verified baseline
Summary: Verified the local MemorySmith.Agent MCP endpoint and live tool inventory using the repo-local key. This memory records the non-destructive route behavior and the current caveats for SteveBot and the MCP skill docs.
Evidence: GET /api/diagnostics returned 401 Unauthorized, so diagnostic endpoints require authenticated access.

GET /mcp returned the live tool catalog: memorysmith_search, memorysmith_hybrid_search, memorysmith_context_pack, memorysmith_get, memorysmith_code_search, memorysmith_code_search_status, memorysmith_page_search, memorysmith_page_get, memorysmith_task_list, memorysmith_task_get.
The semantic-search fallback path remains limited because the ONNX embedding model is not currently present.
Notes: Use the repo-local X-Api-Key from .vscode/mcp.json for any live route probes.
Keep any MCP work scoped to MemorySmith.Agent and its local memory/docs/tasks surfaces.
Update docs and task records from verified tool inventory rather than inferred tool names.
